clean_text:
CENTRAL PUBLIC WORKS DEPARTMENT
(Ministry of Housing & Urban Affairs, Government of India)
Sub-Division Office   Karnataka Circle, No. 18, Ali Askar Road, Bengaluru   560 052
NOTICE INVITING e-TENDER
e-NIT No.: CPWD/KAR-CRC/KVS-BNG-01/2026-27
Date of Issue: 03 June 2026
CONSTRUCTION OF KENDRIYA VIDYALAYA SCHOOL COMPLEX
(Administration Block + Academic Block + Staff Quarters)
Kendriya Vidyalaya No. 3, Sadashivanagar, Bengaluru
(Kendriya Vidyalaya Sangathan   MoE Project)
1. GENERAL
Central Public Works Department (CPWD), Karnataka Circle, invites
online percentage-rate tenders from eligible contractors for the following
work through the CPWD e-Tendering portal (https://etender.cpwd.gov.in):
Work Name     : Construction of KVS School Complex (Admin Block G+2, Academic
                Block G+3, Staff Quarters 16 Units), Sadashivanagar, Bengaluru
Estimated Cost : Rs. 11,80,00,000/- (Rs. Eleven Crore Eighty Lakh)
EMD            : Rs. 23,60,000/- (Rs. Twenty-Three Lakh Sixty Thousand)
Performance Security : 5% of contract value
Tender Fee     : Rs. 1,000/- (online, non-refundable)
Completion Period : 18 months from date of commencement
Defect Liability Period : 12 months
2. KEY DATES
Publication of NIT             : 03 June 2026
Last date for e-tender download : 25 June 2026, 17:00 hrs
Clarification window           : upto 01 July 2026
Pre-bid meeting                : 03 July 2026, 11:00 hrs at CPWD Office, Bengaluru
Last date for submission       : 10 July 2026, 15:00 hrs
Opening of Technical Bids      : 12 July 2026, 11:00 hrs
NOTE: These dates are subject to revision   refer to CPWD portal for latest
schedule. Corrigendum if any will be published on the CPWD e-Tender portal
and NOT individually notified.
3. SCOPE OF WORK
3.1 Civil Works
  (a) Administration Block (Ground + 2 Upper Floors, 1,800 sqm built-up):

      Earthwork, plain cement concrete, RCC framing (M25), brick masonry,
      plastering, flooring (vitrified tiles), false ceiling, painting,
      internal electrification, sanitary and plumbing works.
  (b) Academic Block (Ground + 3 Upper Floors, 3,200 sqm built-up):
      As above; additional provisions: ramp for divyangjan access (RPWD
      Act 2016 compliant), green building features (GRIHA 3-star target),
      laboratory exhaust systems, science block fume hoods (pre-built
      conduit only).
  (c) Staff Quarters (16 units, Type III, 2 Blocks of 8 units each):
      RCC framing, standard CPWD type design, individual meters.
3.2 External Development
  Boundary wall (220 m), vehicular gate + pedestrian gate (CISF-spec
  manual operated), internal roads and paving (interlocking paver blocks),
  landscaping, underground water sump (40 KL), overhead water tank (25 KL),
  STP (10 KLD capacity), external electrification (HT metering).
3.3 Excluded from This Package
  Furniture, IT/AV infrastructure, laboratory equipment, and gymnasium
  equipment are excluded and covered under separate KVS contracts.
4. ELIGIBILITY CRITERIA
NOTE: Eligibility shall be evaluated on the basis of the documents
submitted by the bidder in Cover 1 (Technical Bid). Any bid not meeting
the mandatory criteria below shall be REJECTED without proceeding to Cover 2.
Table 1   Mandatory Eligibility Criteria
Sl. | Criterion                | Requirement
 1  | Annual Turnover          | Average Annual Turnover not less than
    |                          | Rs. 25.00 Crore per year, from civil / building
    |                          | construction works, in each of the last 3
    |                          | financial years (FY 2023-24, 2024-25, 2025-26)
 2  | Technical Experience     | Successfully completed at least 2 (two) similar
    |                          | institutional or government building construction
    |                          | works, each of value not less than Rs. 5.00 Crore,
    |                          | in the last 7 (seven) years
 3  | ISO Certification        | Valid ISO 9001:2015 certification (current)
 4  | CPWD Registration        | Valid CPWD registration   Class I or Special
    |                          | Class Civil Contractor (or SS/S class with
    |                          | appropriate financial limit endorsement)
 5  | Net Worth                | Net Worth not less than Rs. 5.00 Crore as on

    |                          | 31 March 2026, certified by Chartered Accountant
Note on Similar Works: "Institutional or government building construction"
includes: schools, colleges, hospitals, office complexes, government
residential quarters, courts, and police/paramilitary barracks.
Road construction, civil earthwork, canal works, electrical substations,
and IT/telecom works do NOT qualify as similar works for this criterion.
4.2 Documents Required
  (a) Audited financial statements (P&L + Balance Sheet, 3 years)
  (b) Performance/completion certificates for qualifying similar works
  (c) ISO 9001:2015 certificate (valid, from accredited certification body)
  (d) CPWD registration certificate (current)
  (e) GST Registration, PAN, EPF & ESIC registrations
  (f) Affidavit: no blacklisting / debarment from CPWD or any Central Ministry
5. SUBMISSION FORMAT
5.1 Two-Cover System
  Cover 1 (Technical):
    - EMD bank guarantee / demand draft
    - Eligibility documents as listed at 4.2
    - Self-attested affidavit of non-blacklisting
    - Annexure I (Technical Details   format enclosed)
    - Annexure II (Experience Statement   format enclosed)
    - Annexure III (Financial Details   CA certified)
    - Annexure IV (Key Personnel)
    - Annexure V (Plant & Equipment)
  Cover 2 (Financial):
    - Schedule of Quantities (online percentage-rate bid on CPWD portal)
    - No physical submission required for Cover 2
5.2 The percentage to be quoted as percentage above or below the CPWD
    Schedule of Rates (SOR), Building Division 2023 edition.
6. CONTRACT CONDITIONS
6.1 CPWD General Conditions of Contract (GCC) 2020 edition shall apply.
6.2 Time for Completion: 18 months from date of commencement.
6.3 Liquidated Damages: 1% per month of delay, maximum 10% of contract value.
6.4 Labour Law compliance: Contractor responsible for EPF, ESIC, BOCW
    contributions for all workers deployed on site.
6.5 BIS-specified cement, steel (TMT Fe 500D) and other materials to be used.
6.6 All works to be executed in accordance with CPWD Specifications 2019.

7. GENERAL NOTES
7.1 CPWD reserves the right to reject any or all tenders without assigning
    any reason.
7.2 Any attempt to canvass will lead to immediate disqualification.
7.3 Disputes shall be settled through arbitration as per GCC 2020 and
    subject to jurisdiction of courts in New Delhi.
7.4 CPWD may add or delete items from the scope of work during execution
    based on site conditions.
8. CORRIGENDUM NO. 1
Reference: e-NIT No. CPWD/KAR-CRC/KVS-BNG-01/2026-27
Date of Corrigendum: 15 June 2026
The following amendment is hereby made to the Notice Inviting Tender
issued on 03 June 2026:
Item 1   Eligibility Criteria Table 1, Sl. No. 1: Annual Turnover
  Original requirement:
    Average Annual Turnover not less than Rs. 25.00 Crore per year from
    civil / building construction works in each of the last 3 financial years.
  Amended requirement:
    Average Annual Turnover not less than Rs. 50.00 Crore per year from
    civil / building construction works in each of the last 3 financial years.
  Reason: Estimated project cost revised upward by approximately 18% due
  to site investigation report showing adverse soil conditions requiring
  deeper foundations. The Annual Turnover threshold has been revised
  proportionally to ensure adequate financial capacity.
Item 2   Completion Period
  Original: 18 months
  Amended: 22 months (revised following revised scope from site investigation)
All other terms and conditions of the original NIT dated 03 June 2026
remain unchanged.
Bidders who have already downloaded the original tender document must note
this amendment. The Corrigendum is also available on the CPWD e-Tender
portal under the same NIT reference.

9. CONTACT
Assistant Engineer (Civil)
CPWD Sub-Division, Karnataka Circle
No. 18, Ali Askar Road, Bengaluru   560 052
Phone: 080-2220-5678
Email: ae-civil.kar@cpwd.gov.in
END OF NIT (INCLUDES CORRIGENDUM NO. 1)
e-NIT No.: CPWD/KAR-CRC/KVS-BNG-01/2026-27
